name: Lauren Fritts
subject: Happy Birthday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
Today is the Governor's birthday! We are giving him his card tonight. Have you had a chance to sign his card? It's not too late. [**Sign it by 5pm today and we will make sure your message is included.** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43779541:19125449605:m:1:1516426255:C2ADCAB51078BCA2B8EA7045B08DE5B8:r)

Lauren Fritts

name: Heather Larrison
subject: Need to know
body:
Friend -

We're three months into this campaign now and going through our records to identify Jeb's supporters. Here's what we have on file for this email address:

** Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com**
** Jeb 2016 Supporter Status: Pending
[Suggested donation: $1](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/lzkpsdhcqnjrzlzmrdypqrflhhrfclscpdwdjclmnzqd_vgjhhmyr.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/rjcfyklbwvgpjsjcpkqfwphsllphbsybfktkgbscvjwg_vgjhhmyr.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

**Our goal is to reach 10,000 new donors by the end of the September and with your support, I think we can beat it.**

September is a big month for the campaign. We're only ten days away from the second GOP debate and the end of September marks our biggest fundraising deadline yet.

[**Can you pitch in just $1 right now to join our official supporter list? I see your name is still missing.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/eddljtqwphbfdcdrftklpfvcqqfvwcjwltztbwcrhdph_vgjhhmyr.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

**Only $1 - that's all we're asking. We just need to know we can count on you to help share Jeb's story.**

It's critical that we have the resources to win. But more importantly, we need your help to build support across the country one voter at a time.

Donate just $1 today so we know you're all in for Jeb: [**Jeb2016.com/September-Supporter/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/mppgmtpvsdnlwjwcltkgslzjpplzvjmvgtbtnvjcdwsb_vgjhhmyr.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Thanks for your support,

Heather Larrison
Finance Director
Jeb 2016, Inc.

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/iczkpbcqzdmwgrgywbfkzwtrccwtqrpqkbnbmqrydgzz_vgjhhmyr.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=3524&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

name: Team Murphy
subject: It's time to get to work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friend,

Chances are you haven't seen the new attack ad against Patrick.

**That 's because it was taken down after only one day after _politifact.com_ rated it as "False."**

We've seen these tactics before. In 2012, Patrick's Tea Party opponent Allen West tried to smear Patrick with false attacks. It didn't work then, and it won't work now.

Florida families need a Senator they can count on -- not another flashy politician looking to dominate headlines with schoolyard antics.

Patrick's always been there for families in his district. He's ready to roll up his sleeves and get to work in the Senate. This month's FEC fundraising deadline is our chance to show Patrick we're with him.

[**Click here to help get us one step closer to our $50,000 goal -- even $5 makes a big difference.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20f5/738133e4/3af94e92/7f884265/770046750/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150906?refcode=pme150906_m&recurring=true")

Thank you,

Team Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20f5/738133e4/3af94e92/7f884266/770046750/VEsE/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---

name: Rand Paul
subject: Break the Fed's cycle of economic disaster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

The Federal Reserve's printing press provides
the fuel that powers the Washington Machine.

All the bailouts. All the crony capitalism
and insider deals. All the trillions in debt.

All made possible because of the
unaccountable Federal Reserve.

Will you add your name to the fight to Audit
the Fed?

I've introduced Audit the Fed (S.264) -- and
I will not rest until my colleagues are forced to stand in front
of the American people and cast a vote on this vital legislation.

Fellow Conservative, I didn't run for the Senate to keep
a seat warm.

And I didn't enter this race just to be
something.

I'm running for President of the United
States to defeat the Washington Machine and take our country
back.

And that means busting through the unholy
alliance of the Big Government politicians in BOTH parties who
sat on their hands because the Fed "kept the good times rolling."

You and I saw the results of an unchecked
central bank when the Fed-generated bubble exploded in 2008 and
wrecked our economy.

Ever since, our economy has been spinning its
wheels as wages have stagnated and every day Americans feel the
pinch as paychecks are stretched to the breaking point.

But times were good for the well-connected as
the Fed created money out of thin air to fund Big Government
boondoggles like the bailouts and the failed Obama stimulus
package.

The status quo has failed too many Americans
and I won't sit idly by.

Changing Washington starts with forcing the
Fed to open its books.

It starts with slamming the breaks on the
Fed's ability to increase the money supply and devalue the dollar
while allowing Big Government to borrow trillions.

And it starts with Congress passing Audit the
Fed.

Fellow Conservative, I believe this is a fight you and I
can win.

I'm the only candidate to lead Hillary
Clinton in five states won by Barack Obama because voters know I
don't just brag about defeating the Washington Machine on the
campaign trail, I have a proven record of fighting to upend the
status quo.

So I hope I can count on you to add your name
to the fight by completing your "Audit the Fed NOW" petition.

And after you fill out your petition, please
chip in a contribution so I can continue to fight tooth-and-nail
to break the Federal Reserve's print-borrow-and-spend cycle of
economic disaster.

Chip in $10
immediately >>

Chip in $25
immediately >>

Chip in $50
immediately >>

Chip in $100
immediately >>

Or donate another
amount >>

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWkqb-HmN9

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Katie McGinty
subject: Labor Day
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
body:
Friend --

Sometimes, amidst the parties, picnics and parades, we forget that Labor Day is more than just a fun way to transition from summer to fall. It’s a time for all Americans to come together and celebrate the achievements of our labor movement, which has done so much to help hardworking families live a better life and realize their dreams.

Growing up as the daughter of a Philadelphia police officer and a restaurant hostess, my parents had to work hard to put food on the table for me and my nine siblings. Thanks to hard-fought victories by our labor movement, our friends and neighbors can provide for their families, just like my parents were able to provide for our family and make college not just a dream, but a possibility.

Tomorrow, as we celebrate, we also remember those who fought for the important labor rights that we all enjoy today. Take a moment and share with me on Facebook why Labor Day is important to you: https://www.facebook.com/katiemcgintypa/posts/807554006032484

Politicians like Pat Toomey want to undo all the progress that's been made in Pennsylvania. Toomey has opposed efforts to raise the federal minimum wage and voted against ensuring men and women are guaranteed equal pay for equal work.

As your next U.S. Senator, I vow to work for a higher minimum wage, equal pay for equal work, and high quality jobs with better benefits. Together we must make sure that if you’re willing to work hard, you can get ahead.

I’d love for you to share your thoughts about Labor Day. What does this holiday mean to you? How have you benefited from the American labor movement? How are you celebrating this important day?

Click here to share with me why you’re celebrating Labor Day this year >> https://www.facebook.com/katiemcgintypa/posts/807554006032484

Hope you have a wonderful holiday,

Katie

----------------------------------------------
| Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
----------------------------------------------

If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please https://act.myngp.com/el/6948922382421590016/271361668758372352.

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States
